verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've been on the mountain I've seen the peaks so high, Soarin' with the eagles Takin' to the sky. But, it wasn't long ago That I was in the valley low When You rescued me, You carried me So this one thing I know.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm gonna let Jesus wear the crown I'm gonna give the glory all around, To the one who deserves all the praise. You know, I am so easy to forget, All the desperate prayers You have met I'm gonna give the glory, Gonna let Jesus wear the crown.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now I've been in this spotlight many times before, You've given many talents that I am thankful for. But, when the praise is given, I just give it back to You 'cause without Your hand, Your perfect plan I'm nothing without You.
